## Core Features

- **Railway-Oriented Programming (`r[T]`)**: Error as values, not exceptions
- **Dependency Injection (`FlextContainer`)**: Type-safe service registration & resolution
- **CQRS Dispatcher**: Typed command/query routing with event support
- **Domain-Driven Design**: Pydantic v2 entities, aggregates, commands
- **Protocol-Based Architecture**: 10+ structural typing contracts
- **Comprehensive Utilities**: 20+ utility modules for common tasks
